resources.string: Tap into a text field first, then tap the bubble.
Nothing to rewrite — the field is empty.
Sign in to DraftRight to use rewrite.

Lets the DraftRight bubble read the text field you\'re typing in and replace it with an AI-rewritten version, in place. Text is sent only to your configured DraftRight rewrite service; nothing else is collected.
Enable DraftRight in Accessibility to rewrite text with the bubble.
